name: Builder.io
description: Visual headless CMS with drag-and-drop editing and AI-powered design-to-code

description.value: Visual headless CMS with drag-and-drop editing using your own components and AI-powered Figma-to-code

repository.comment: Open-source SDKs, examples, and plugins; core platform is proprietary SaaS

license.comment: SDKs are MIT licensed; core platform is proprietary SaaS

initial-release.comment: Company founded in 2018; commerce tool launched in 2019

cms-type.comment: API-first headless CMS with visual drag-and-drop editor

api-type.comment: Content API v3 with REST and GraphQL endpoints

static-site-generation.comment: Works with SSG frameworks; official integrations with Next.js, Gatsby, Astro

edge-deployment.comment: Content delivered via AWS CloudFront CDN; supports edge personalization

content-types.comment: Page models, Section models, and Data models for custom content types

custom-fields.comment: Custom fields on all model types with extensive configuration options

field-types.comment: Text, Long Text, Rich Text/HTML, File, Number, Boolean, URL, and more

content-relationships.comment: Multi-level nested references supported in content API

nested-components.comment: Core feature: drag-and-drop with your own registered components; Symbols for reusable blocks

localization.comment: Field-level localization; visual approach to creating localized variants

content-validation.comment: Required fields, min/max length, enum values, custom validation

embedded-interactives.comment: Register custom React/Vue/Qwik components for drag-and-drop; supports interactive elements

content-versioning.comment: Content variants for A/B testing; draft and published versions

draft-publish.comment: Draft and published content states with preview capabilities

scheduled-publishing.comment: Schedule content to go live; align with roadmap and campaigns

approval-workflows.comment: Workflow features added to Spaces; Enterprise plans have custom workflows

content-locking.comment: No explicit documentation found on content locking

audit-logging.comment: Activity log tracks content and configuration changes; 30 days history; filter by user

media-library.comment: Built-in Asset Library for photos and media management

image-transformations.comment: Basic image optimization; Cloudinary integration for advanced transformations

external-media-storage.comment: Cloudinary App Extension for external media; can use images hosted elsewhere

video-support.comment: Video upload supported; served via CDN

svg-support.comment: SVG files supported in asset library

role-based-access.comment: Built-in roles: Contributor, Editor, Designer, Developer, Admin

granular-permissions.comment: Custom roles with per-model permissions; field and locale-level access (Enterprise)

sso-saml.comment: OIDC and SAML 2.0 SSO; Enterprise plan required; supports Azure AD, Okta, Google Workspace

team-collaboration.comment: Multiple users per space; Organization and Space-level user management

audience-restrictions.comment: Targeting attributes for content personalization; audience-based content delivery

typescript-sdk.comment: Official TypeScript SDK; React, Next.js, Vue, Qwik, and Svelte SDKs

content-type-sdk.comment: Content models defined via UI; no code-first model definition

cli-tools.comment: CLI tools available in SDK package

local-development.comment: Local preview with Visual Editor; configure localhost as preview URL

webhooks.comment: Webhooks for content changes; can load data from own database via webhooks

plugin-system.comment: Register custom components; App Extensions like Cloudinary integration

admin-ui-customization.comment: Custom components appear in Visual Editor; custom field types

documentation-quality.comment: Good documentation with guides, API reference, tutorials; active community forum

frontend-frameworks.comment: Official SDKs for React, Vue, Svelte, Qwik; integrations with all major frameworks

search-integration.comment: Content API supports filtering; integrations available

preview-mode.comment: Real-time visual preview in editor; live preview of data models and custom fields

ecommerce-integration.comment: Native Shopify integration; BigCommerce, commercetools support

analytics-integration.comment: Built-in heat maps; analytics integrations for A/B testing

ai-features.comment: Visual Copilot: Figma-to-code with AI; AI-powered design-to-code workflow

cdn-included.comment: AWS CloudFront CDN for content and assets

rate-limits.comment: Free: 10k visual views/month; Pro: 100k; Enterprise: custom

global-regions.comment: Global CDN distribution via AWS CloudFront

free-tier.comment: Publish Free: 10 users, 10k visual views/month; Develop Free: 20 code generations

open-source.comment: SDKs are open source (MIT); core platform is proprietary SaaS

pricing-model.comment: Free tier, Pro ($19-39/mo), Enterprise custom; based on users and visual views

commercial-support.comment: Enterprise plans with SLAs and support

enterprise-features.comment: SSO/SAML, custom roles, audit logging, SOC 2 compliance, SLAs
